name: Ille-et-Vilaine (France)
description: Ermine field (white strewn with black ermine spots) charged with two blue wavy pales.
history: The ermine recalls Brittany while the two wavy bands represent the rivers Ille and Vilaine that name the department.

features.role: ermine spots strewn across the field
two wavy pales for the rivers Ille and Vilaine
